subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received. Praise be to God, it spoke of steadfastness and firmness beneath the shelter of the Word of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه رسید الحمد لله ناطق بثبوت و رسوخ در ظل کلمه الله بود
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @firmness in the Covenant
